caption.full:
June Squibb joins Alex Borstein in 'Turn the Lights Back On'

Oscar nominee June Squibb will play Mary, the mother of Alex Borstein's character Emma in the indie dramedy. The film is based on true Covid-era events about a family facing dementia and perimenopause. This project marks the feature debut of writer-director Dave Pantano.

What are your thoughts on this casting and subject matter?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #Hollywood #JuneSquibb #TurnTheLightsBackOn

June Squibb will star opposite Alex Borstein in the indie dramedy 'Turn the Lights Back On'. Squibb plays Mary, the mother of Borstein's character Emma, a teacher dealing with perimenopause. The film is based on true Covid-era events about families facing dementia and perimenopause.
